authority_boundary.allowed_claim: Copied non-secret Ring-2 premise-retrieval run rankings can be scored against after-the-fact labels to report precision, recall, adversarial misses, and retrieval-versus-proof failure attribution.
forbidden_claims: proof bodies or oracle-needed premise ids may appear in rankings
test split labels may tune retrieval
benchmark performance, release, publication, or recipient work is authorized

validation_rules: Precision and recall must be computed from copied non-secret macro run rankings and after-the-fact metric labels, not stand-in product evidence.
The fixture must retain source refs, source digests, target refs, and validation refs for copied macro material.
The fixture and exported bundle must carry exact copied source artifacts under source_artifacts/ with digest checks against the macro source refs.
The fixture must include an adversarial decoy/miss case.
Failure attribution must distinguish retrieval_hit, retrieval_miss, and proof_failure_despite_hit; partial_retrieval_miss remains allowed when observed.
Proof bodies, provider bodies, private source bodies, and oracle-needed ids inside rankings are forbidden.
Metrics cannot claim proof, benchmark, provider, release, publication, or recipient-work authority.
The source_open_body_imports summary must count the four exact copied macro source artifacts as source-open body material only when their target digests match the source digests.
Validator receipts may include source-open body import ids, target refs, and digest status, but not copied source body text.
receipt_expectations: result receipt with precision/recall metrics, copied-material provenance, source artifact imports, secret_exclusion_scan, and failure attribution
board receipt with public contract, copied-material status, source artifact status, and authority ceiling
receipt summaries expose source_open_body_imports with body material ids, body count, digest-backed target refs, and body_in_receipt=false
anti_claim: This standard governs copied non-secret Ring-2 premise-retrieval run metrics only; it does not expose proof bodies, certify theorem correctness, authorize Lean/Lake, authorize release, or prove private macro equivalence.
known_failure_modes: source artifact named only as a source_ref while no copied target file exists under Microcosm
copied source artifact digest diverges from the macro source digest
oracle-needed premise ids leak into provider-facing rankings
proof body, provider payload, or private source body appears in public fixtures or receipts
test split labels are used to tune retrieval instead of after-the-fact metrics
precision/recall metrics claim theorem-proof, benchmark, release, publication, or provider authority
adversarial decoy/miss case is absent from the evaluation policy
retrieval hit is conflated with proof success instead of reporting proof_failure_despite_hit

standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe Ring2 premise-retrieval precision/recall harness over copied macro run rankings, after-the-fact metric labels, and exact copied macro run source artifacts.
standard_payload.teleology: Make the real Ring2 retrieval measurement substrate inspectable in Microcosm while keeping proof bodies, provider payloads, live access, and release authority excluded.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: Turning copied retrieval metrics or source artifacts into theorem-proof, benchmark, provider, private-equivalence, or release authority.
failure_modes: source artifact named only as a source_ref while no copied target file exists under Microcosm
copied source artifact digest diverges from the macro source digest
oracle-needed premise ids leak into provider-facing rankings
proof body, provider payload, or private source body appears in public fixtures or receipts
test split labels are used to tune retrieval instead of after-the-fact metrics
precision/recall metrics claim theorem-proof, benchmark, release, publication, or provider authority
adversarial decoy/miss case is absent from the evaluation policy
retrieval hit is conflated with proof success instead of reporting proof_failure_despite_hit
standard_payload.rebuild_action: run ring2_premise_retrieval_precision_recall_harness on fixture and exported bundle, then refresh macro projection import accounting and workingness
